'''âj-t-sh''' ('''jatasha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yeuk|yeuk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-t-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yeuk|yeuk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-t-sh
|-
! Lemma
| jatasha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jatashithi|jatashithi]] || [[word:jatashiji|jatashiji]] || [[word:jatashishi|jatashishi]] || [[word:jatashi|jatashi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jatashuthuth|jatashuthuth]] || [[word:jatashujuj|jatashujuj]] || [[word:jatashushush|jatashushush]] || [[word:jatash|jatash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jatashuthu|jatashuthu]] || [[word:jatashuju|jatashuju]] || [[word:jatashushu|jatashushu]] || [[word:jatashu|jatashu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jatashufuth|jatashufuth]] || [[word:jatashufuj|jatashufuj]] || [[word:jatashufush|jatashufush]] || [[word:jatashuf|jatashuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jatashethe|jatashethe]] || [[word:jatasheje|jatasheje]] || [[word:jatasheshe|jatasheshe]] || [[word:jatashe|jatashe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jatashothoth|jatashothoth]] || [[word:jatashojoj|jatashojoj]] || [[word:jatashoshosh|jatashoshosh]] || [[word:jatash|jatash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jatashotho|jatashotho]] || [[word:jatashojo|jatashojo]] || [[word:jatashosho|jatashosho]] || [[word:jatasho|jatasho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jatashofoth|jatashofoth]] || [[word:jatashofoj|jatashofoj]] || [[word:jatashofosh|jatashofosh]] || [[word:jatashof|jatashof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jatashĂŠthĂŠ|jatashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:jatashĂŠjĂŠ|jatashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:jatashĂŠshĂŠ|jatashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:jatashĂŠ|jatashĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jatashathath|jatashathath]] || [[word:jatashajaj|jatashajaj]] || [[word:jatashashash|jatashashash]] || [[word:jatash|jatash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jatashatha|jatashatha]] || [[word:jatashaja|jatashaja]] || [[word:jatashasha|jatashasha]] || [[word:jatasha|jatasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jatashafath|jatashafath]] || [[word:jatashafaj|jatashafaj]] || [[word:jatashafash|jatashafash]] || [[word:jatashaf|jatashaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:jatashasha|jatashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gojatashasha|gojatashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokijatashasha|gokijatashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:jatashnĂŒsha|jatashnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gojatashnknĂŒsha|gojatashnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokijatashnĂŒsha|gokijatashnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jatashĂ«sha|jatashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojatashnkshĂ«sha|gojatashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijatashĂ«sha|gokijatashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jatashrosha|jatashrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojatashnkrosha|gojatashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijatashrosha|gokijatashrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jatashmusha|jatashmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gojatashnkmusha|gojatashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijatashmusha|gokijatashmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:jatasherasha|jatasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gojatashnksherasha|gojatashnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokijatasherasha|gokijatasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:jatashngasha|jatashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gojatashnkngasha|gojatashnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokijatashngasha|gokijatashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jatashyasha|jatashyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gojatashnkyasha|gojatashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokijatashyasha|gokijatashyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:jatashyamasha|jatashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gojatashnkyamasha|gojatashnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokijatashyamasha|gokijatashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:jatashnĂŒshĂ«sha|jatashnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojatashnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gojatashnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijatashnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokijatashnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jatashnĂŒrosha|jatashnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojatashnknĂŒrosha|gojatashnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijatashnĂŒrosha|gokijatashnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jatashnĂŒmusha|jatashnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojatashnknĂŒmusha|gojatashnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijatashnĂŒmusha|gokijatashnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:jatashĂ«nĂŒsha|jatashĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojatashnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gojatashnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijatashĂ«nĂŒsha|gokijatashĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jatashĂ«rosha|jatashĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojatashnkshĂ«rosha|gojatashnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijatashĂ«rosha|gokijatashĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jatashĂ«musha|jatashĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojatashnkshĂ«musha|gojatashnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijatashĂ«musha|gokijatashĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:jatashronĂŒsha|jatashronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojatashnkronĂŒsha|gojatashnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijatashronĂŒsha|gokijatashronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:jatashroshĂ«sha|jatashroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojatashnkroshĂ«sha|gojatashnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijatashroshĂ«sha|gokijatashroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jatashromusha|jatashromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojatashnkromusha|gojatashnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijatashromusha|gokijatashromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:jatashmunĂŒsha|jatashmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojatashnkmunĂŒsha|gojatashnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijatashmunĂŒsha|gokijatashmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:jatashmushĂ«sha|jatashmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojatashnkmushĂ«sha|gojatashnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijatashmushĂ«sha|gokijatashmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jatashmurosha|jatashmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojatashnkmurosha|gojatashnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijatashmurosha|gokijatashmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:jatash|jatash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:jĂŠtĂŠsh|jĂŠtĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hojatash|hojatash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hojĂŠtĂŠsh|hojĂŠtĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojatash|hohojatash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojĂŠtĂŠsh|hohojĂŠtĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒjatash|nĂŒjatash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒjĂŠtĂŠsh|nĂŒjĂŠtĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒjatash|nĂŒnĂŒjatash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒjĂŠtĂŠsh|nĂŒnĂŒjĂŠtĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻjatash|nĂŻjatash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻjĂŠtĂŠsh|nĂŻjĂŠtĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻjatash|nĂŻnĂŻjatash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻjĂŠtĂŠsh|nĂŻnĂŻjĂŠtĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lujatash|lujatash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lujĂŠtĂŠsh|lujĂŠtĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujatash|lulujatash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujĂŠtĂŠsh|lulujĂŠtĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lijatash|lijatash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lijĂŠtĂŠsh|lijĂŠtĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijatash|lilijatash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijĂŠtĂŠsh|lilijĂŠtĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kojatash|kojatash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kojĂŠtĂŠsh|kojĂŠtĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojatash|kokojatash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojĂŠtĂŠsh|kokojĂŠtĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kejatash|kejatash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kejĂŠtĂŠsh|kejĂŠtĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejatash|kekejatash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejĂŠtĂŠsh|kekejĂŠtĂŠsh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
